This repository serves as an experimentation ground for testing new methods for binary neural networks that work using 1-bit weight representations. The main focus is creating a proof of concept for a new method that can be used to train binary neural networks effectively.

## Repository Structure

- `docs/`: Contains documentation and research of our current methods and experiments.
- `src/`: Contains the source code for our implementations and experiments.
- `tests/`: Contains test cases for our implementations.
